Args:
cat <<'EOF' > /home/kong/kong.yml && \
cat <<'EOF' > /home/kong/custom_nginx.template && \
cat <<'EOF' > /home/kong/localhost.crt && \
cat <<'EOF' > /home/kong/localhost.key && \
./docker-entrypoint.sh kong docker-start --nginx-conf /home/kong/custom_nginx.template
_format_version: "1.1"
services:
  - name: auth-v1-open
    _comment: "GoTrue: /auth/v1/verify* -> http://auth:9999/verify*"
    url: http://supabase_auth_anwalts-frontend-new:9999/verify
    routes:
      - name: auth-v1-open
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /auth/v1/verify
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: auth-v1-open-callback
    _comment: "GoTrue: /auth/v1/callback* -> http://auth:9999/callback*"
    url: http://supabase_auth_anwalts-frontend-new:9999/callback
    routes:
      - name: auth-v1-open-callback
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /auth/v1/callback
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: auth-v1-open-authorize
    _comment: "GoTrue: /auth/v1/authorize* -> http://auth:9999/authorize*"
    url: http://supabase_auth_anwalts-frontend-new:9999/authorize
    routes:
      - name: auth-v1-open-authorize
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /auth/v1/authorize
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: auth-v1
    _comment: "GoTrue: /auth/v1/* -> http://auth:9999/*"
    url: http://supabase_auth_anwalts-frontend-new:9999/
    routes:
      - name: auth-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /auth/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: rest-v1
    _comment: "PostgREST: /rest/v1/* -> http://rest:3000/*"
    url: http://supabase_rest_anwalts-frontend-new:3000/
    routes:
      - name: rest-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /rest/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: rest-admin-v1
    _comment: "PostgREST: /rest-admin/v1/* -> http://rest:3001/*"
    url: http://supabase_rest_anwalts-frontend-new:3001/
    routes:
      - name: rest-admin-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /rest-admin/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: graphql-v1
    _comment: "PostgREST: /graphql/v1 -> http://rest:3000/rpc/graphql"
    url: http://supabase_rest_anwalts-frontend-new:3000/rpc/graphql
    routes:
      - name: graphql-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /graphql/v1
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "Content-Profile: graphql_public"
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: realtime-v1-ws
    _comment: "Realtime: /realtime/v1/* -> ws://realtime:4000/socket/websocket"
    url: http://realtime-dev:4000/socket
    protocol: ws
    routes:
      - name: realtime-v1-ws
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /realtime/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: realtime-v1-longpoll
    _comment: "Realtime: /realtime/v1/* -> ws://realtime:4000/socket/longpoll"
    url: http://realtime-dev:4000/socket
    protocol: http
    routes:
      - name: realtime-v1-longpoll
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /realtime/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: realtime-v1-rest
    _comment: "Realtime: /realtime/v1/* -> http://realtime:4000/api/*"
    url: http://realtime-dev:4000/api
    protocol: http
    routes:
      - name: realtime-v1-rest
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /realtime/v1/api
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: storage-v1
    _comment: "Storage: /storage/v1/* -> http://storage-api:5000/*"
    url: http://supabase_storage_anwalts-frontend-new:5000/
    routes:
      - name: storage-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /storage/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: pg-meta
    _comment: "pg-meta: /pg/* -> http://pg-meta:8080/*"
    url: http://supabase_pg_meta_anwalts-frontend-new:8080/
    routes:
      - name: pg-meta-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /pg/
  - name: functions-v1
    _comment: "Functions: /functions/v1/* -> http://edge-runtime:8081/*"
    url: http://supabase_edge_runtime_anwalts-frontend-new:8081/
    # Set request idle timeout to 150s to match hosted project
    # Ref: https://supabase.com/docs/guides/functions/limits
    read_timeout: 150000
    routes:
      - name: functions-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /functions/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: analytics-v1
    _comment: "Analytics: /analytics/v1/* -> http://logflare:4000/*"
    url: http://supabase_analytics_anwalts-frontend-new:4000/
    routes:
      - name: analytics-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /analytics/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: pooler-v2-ws
    _comment: "Pooler: /pooler/v2/* -> ws://pooler:4000/v2/*"
    url: http://supabase_pooler_anwalts-frontend-new:4000/v2
    protocol: ws
    routes:
      - name: pooler-v2-ws
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /pooler/v2/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: mcp
    _comment: "MCP: /mcp -> http://studio:3000/api/mcp"
    url: http://supabase_studio_anwalts-frontend-new:3000/api/mcp
    routes:
      - name: mcp
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /mcp
    plugins:
      - name: cors

EOF
pid pids/nginx.pid;                      # this setting is mandatory
error_log logs/error.log ${{LOG_LEVEL}}; # can be set by kong.conf

daemon ${{NGINX_DAEMON}};                     # can be set by kong.conf
worker_processes ${{NGINX_WORKER_PROCESSES}}; # can be set by kong.conf

events {
    multi_accept on;
}

http {
    # here, we declare our custom location serving our website
    # (or API portal) which we can optimize for serving static assets
    server {
        server_name email_templates;
        listen 0.0.0.0:8088 reuseport backlog=16384;

        access_log logs/email_templates_access.log;
        error_log  logs/error.log notice;

        location /email {
            autoindex on;
            root /home/kong/templates;
        }
    }

    # include default Kong Nginx config
    include 'nginx-kong.conf';
}

EOF

Name: /supabase_kong_anwalts-frontend-new

Entrypoint:
cat <<'EOF' > /home/kong/kong.yml && \
cat <<'EOF' > /home/kong/custom_nginx.template && \
cat <<'EOF' > /home/kong/localhost.crt && \
cat <<'EOF' > /home/kong/localhost.key && \
./docker-entrypoint.sh kong docker-start --nginx-conf /home/kong/custom_nginx.template
_format_version: "1.1"
services:
  - name: auth-v1-open
    _comment: "GoTrue: /auth/v1/verify* -> http://auth:9999/verify*"
    url: http://supabase_auth_anwalts-frontend-new:9999/verify
    routes:
      - name: auth-v1-open
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /auth/v1/verify
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: auth-v1-open-callback
    _comment: "GoTrue: /auth/v1/callback* -> http://auth:9999/callback*"
    url: http://supabase_auth_anwalts-frontend-new:9999/callback
    routes:
      - name: auth-v1-open-callback
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /auth/v1/callback
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: auth-v1-open-authorize
    _comment: "GoTrue: /auth/v1/authorize* -> http://auth:9999/authorize*"
    url: http://supabase_auth_anwalts-frontend-new:9999/authorize
    routes:
      - name: auth-v1-open-authorize
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /auth/v1/authorize
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: auth-v1
    _comment: "GoTrue: /auth/v1/* -> http://auth:9999/*"
    url: http://supabase_auth_anwalts-frontend-new:9999/
    routes:
      - name: auth-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /auth/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: rest-v1
    _comment: "PostgREST: /rest/v1/* -> http://rest:3000/*"
    url: http://supabase_rest_anwalts-frontend-new:3000/
    routes:
      - name: rest-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /rest/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: rest-admin-v1
    _comment: "PostgREST: /rest-admin/v1/* -> http://rest:3001/*"
    url: http://supabase_rest_anwalts-frontend-new:3001/
    routes:
      - name: rest-admin-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /rest-admin/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: graphql-v1
    _comment: "PostgREST: /graphql/v1 -> http://rest:3000/rpc/graphql"
    url: http://supabase_rest_anwalts-frontend-new:3000/rpc/graphql
    routes:
      - name: graphql-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /graphql/v1
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "Content-Profile: graphql_public"
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: realtime-v1-ws
    _comment: "Realtime: /realtime/v1/* -> ws://realtime:4000/socket/websocket"
    url: http://realtime-dev:4000/socket
    protocol: ws
    routes:
      - name: realtime-v1-ws
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /realtime/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: realtime-v1-longpoll
    _comment: "Realtime: /realtime/v1/* -> ws://realtime:4000/socket/longpoll"
    url: http://realtime-dev:4000/socket
    protocol: http
    routes:
      - name: realtime-v1-longpoll
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /realtime/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: realtime-v1-rest
    _comment: "Realtime: /realtime/v1/* -> http://realtime:4000/api/*"
    url: http://realtime-dev:4000/api
    protocol: http
    routes:
      - name: realtime-v1-rest
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /realtime/v1/api
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: storage-v1
    _comment: "Storage: /storage/v1/* -> http://storage-api:5000/*"
    url: http://supabase_storage_anwalts-frontend-new:5000/
    routes:
      - name: storage-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /storage/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: pg-meta
    _comment: "pg-meta: /pg/* -> http://pg-meta:8080/*"
    url: http://supabase_pg_meta_anwalts-frontend-new:8080/
    routes:
      - name: pg-meta-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /pg/
  - name: functions-v1
    _comment: "Functions: /functions/v1/* -> http://edge-runtime:8081/*"
    url: http://supabase_edge_runtime_anwalts-frontend-new:8081/
    # Set request idle timeout to 150s to match hosted project
    # Ref: https://supabase.com/docs/guides/functions/limits
    read_timeout: 150000
    routes:
      - name: functions-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /functions/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: analytics-v1
    _comment: "Analytics: /analytics/v1/* -> http://logflare:4000/*"
    url: http://supabase_analytics_anwalts-frontend-new:4000/
    routes:
      - name: analytics-v1-all
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /analytics/v1/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: pooler-v2-ws
    _comment: "Pooler: /pooler/v2/* -> ws://pooler:4000/v2/*"
    url: http://supabase_pooler_anwalts-frontend-new:4000/v2
    protocol: ws
    routes:
      - name: pooler-v2-ws
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /pooler/v2/
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          replace:
            headers:
              - "Authorization: $((function() return (headers.authorization ~= nil and headers.authorization:sub(1, 10) ~= 'Bearer sb_' and headers.authorization) or (headers.apikey == '<REDACTED_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or (headers.apikey == 'sb_publishable_ACJWlzQHlZjBrEguHvfOxg_3BJgxAaH' and 'Bearer <REDACTED_SUPABASE_TOKEN>') or headers.apikey end)())"
  - name: mcp
    _comment: "MCP: /mcp -> http://studio:3000/api/mcp"
    url: http://supabase_studio_anwalts-frontend-new:3000/api/mcp
    routes:
      - name: mcp
        strip_path: true
        paths:
          - /mcp
    plugins:
      - name: cors

EOF
pid pids/nginx.pid;                      # this setting is mandatory
error_log logs/error.log ${{LOG_LEVEL}}; # can be set by kong.conf

daemon ${{NGINX_DAEMON}};                     # can be set by kong.conf
worker_processes ${{NGINX_WORKER_PROCESSES}}; # can be set by kong.conf

events {
    multi_accept on;
}

http {
    # here, we declare our custom location serving our website
    # (or API portal) which we can optimize for serving static assets
    server {
        server_name email_templates;
        listen 0.0.0.0:8088 reuseport backlog=16384;

        access_log logs/email_templates_access.log;
        error_log  logs/error.log notice;

        location /email {
            autoindex on;
            root /home/kong/templates;
        }
    }

    # include default Kong Nginx config
    include 'nginx-kong.conf';
}

EOF
